description: FATHIYA CORE environment variable contract. Names only -- no values. Set in deployment platform secrets.

rules.vite_prefix_for_client: VITE_ prefix required for client-side vars (import.meta.env)
rules.no_prefix_for_server: Server-side vars have no VITE_ prefix

env_vars.name: OPENROUTER_API_KEY
env_vars.description: OpenRouter API key for LLM calls

env_vars.name: OPENROUTER_FAST_MODEL
env_vars.description: Fast model slot -- formatting, classification, small transforms

env_vars.name: OPENROUTER_REASONING_MODEL
env_vars.description: Reasoning model slot -- crypto analysis, scenario building

env_vars.name: OPENROUTER_CRITIC_MODEL
env_vars.description: Critic model slot -- quality gate, risk review, failure modes

env_vars.name: OPENROUTER_STRUCTURED_MODEL
env_vars.description: Structured model slot -- JSON extraction, schema filling

env_vars.name: FATHIYA_PUBLIC_APP_URL
env_vars.description: Public URL for Command Center UI

env_vars.name: FATHIYA_PUBLIC_MCP_URL
env_vars.description: Public URL for MCP server endpoint

env_vars.name: FATHIYA_PUBLIC_HOOKS_URL
env_vars.description: Public URL for webhook ingress receiver

deployment_checklist: Set OPENROUTER_API_KEY in server deployment secrets
Optional: override model slots with preferred models
Run npm run build to verify

command_center_display.description: Command Center will show missing env vars at runtime
